_doc: THROWAWAY (ckpt 172, freeroam HUD slice 1c-2 portrait bank-hunt, findings/freeroam-hud.md §6). The prior INT3 probe at 0x4951db (test eax,eax right after char+0x50 loads) never fired across a sword2-nav/held replay despite the portrait visibly rendering in the SAME capture's .osr — this spec reads the whole leader-match chain as FIELDS at 0x494e60's onEnter instead (no control-flow-dependent breakpoint to miss): in_ECX+0x1b4 (leader_uid), each of the 8 room+0x4030 slots' +0x9f4/+0x9c4/+0x9f0 (the :78-80 match test), and for each slot the derived char ptr (+0x9f4 -> +0x750) + its +0x50 portrait descriptor + the descriptor's +4 bank_idx (packed with the +6 frame in the same 32-bit read; mask bank_idx = value & 0xffff). A field-spec-only capture can't miss on control flow the way an INT3 can — every 0x494e60 call reads ALL of these regardless of which inner branch retail takes. Once s{k}_portdesc is confirmed non-null for the matching slot, resolve s{k}_bank_fr6's low u16 (idx) against the unified pool table DAT_008a760c (portrait_slot_dims.json precedent: chain va=hex(0x8a760c+idx*4), hops=[], off=0x40/0x20/0x24 = resource_id/width/height) in a FOLLOW-UP capture. Run: nix develop --command python3 tools/frida_capture.py --no-turbo --lockstep --seed-pin --input-trace runs/sync/sword2-nav.jsonl --held-trace runs/sword2-held.jsonl --field-spec tools/flow/hud_portrait_fields.json --field-spec-only --call-trace --run-dir runs/hud-portrait --duration-ms 150000. NOT YET RUN SUCCESSFULLY (ckpt 172): this exact nav pair never gets retail's title menu past a boot-sequence dead end under frida_capture.py — a poll for an unmapped btn=0x22 that the ring-injection never satisfies (a SEPARATE, unresolved issue from the frame/tick-axis fix this same ckpt landed in frida_capture.py/opensummoners-agent.js). A native capture-proxy detour (0x494e60, built+used+reverted, see findings/freeroam-hud.md §7) reached the errands fine with this SAME trace and found a DEEPER blocker: leader_uid (in_ECX+0x1b4) never arms across the WHOLE replayed session regardless of tooling — a replay-fidelity gap, not a probe-placement issue. The field chains below are still believed correct (mirrored 1:1 from the native probe's C); keep for whoever revisits via Frida once the boot-nav dead end is separately understood.

0x494e60.name: hud_render_panel
0x494e60._note: FUN_00494e60 (3904 B) the freeroam leader-panel HUD renderer (bars/frame/EXP/stars/level/portrait), __thiscall this=the HUD render context. :74 gates the whole leader block on in_ECX+0x1b4!=0; :77-80 loop 8 room+0x4030 slots for one whose +0x9c4==1 && +0x9f0!=0x5f5e168 && +0x9f4==in_ECX+0x1b4; on match, iVar6=*(slot+0x9f4)+0x750 (the char ptr the EXP gauge confirmed bit-exact at ckpt 171 reads +0xe8/+0xec off); :125 iVar10=iVar6+0x50 (the portrait descriptor) gates the portrait+frame-fade+sub-blit block (:125-165, static-disasm-confirmed 0x495204-0x49520f/0x49525e/0x4952b4). Cross-VA context: FUN_0049af40 is the separate per-frame HP/portrait FADE-TIMER animator over the same room+0x4030 slots.

fields.name: leader_uid
fields.reason: in_ECX+0x1b4 the leader-match id compared against each slot's +0x9f4

fields.name: gate_1b0
fields.reason: in_ECX+0x1b0 gates the whole bars/EXP/frame/stars/portrait block (:82); also reused as a %-lerp (:263)

fields.name: mode10
fields.reason: in_ECX+0x10 party-count/display-mode (1/2 = the leader block; 3 = skip via goto LAB_004952c4)

fields.name: headstate1c8
fields.reason: in_ECX+0x1c8 the head-state selecting which of char+0x50's 3 frame fields (+6/+8/+10) FUN_00418470 draws

fields.name: s0_uid
fields.reason: slot0+0x9f4 vs leader_uid (:80 match test); room+0x4030+0x0

fields.name: s0_active
fields.reason: slot0+0x9c4 (:79 ==1 gate)

fields.name: s0_sentinel
fields.reason: slot0+0x9f0 (:79 !=0x5f5e168 gate)

fields.name: s0_char
fields.reason: *(slot0+0x9f4)+0x750 = iVar6, the char ptr EXP/bars/portrait read off (:81)

fields.name: s0_portdesc
fields.reason: char(slot0)+0x50 = iVar10, the portrait descriptor (:125); THE null-or-not answer

fields.name: s0_bank_fr6
fields.reason: packed 32-bit read at portdesc+4: low u16 = bank_idx (mov cx,[eax+4], the pool[idx] key), high u16 = the +6 default-head-state frame
